title: rhododendron keleticum
intro: Rhododendron keleticum, also known as the Keletic rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rhododendron keleticum include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is also used in topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
